City Experiment Fund
AI FOR
CITIES
How cities around the world are using artificial intelligence to improve lives, services, and decisions.
Case Studies
Language EN УКР МКД ՀԱՅ ALB CG
AI Role 1 of 4
Sensemaking Intelligence
AI detects patterns, trends, and signals hidden across large, fragmented datasets.
CHI
🇺🇸 Chicago · USA
Food Safety Inspection Forecasting
Chicago had 16,000 food establishments and limited inspectors. Violations were being discovered weeks after they began — after customers had already been exposed.
Sensemaking
NSW
🇦🇺 New South Wales · Australia
Spatial Digital Twin
Government agencies worked from separate, disconnected datasets, making coordinated planning and emergency response nearly impossible.
Sensemaking
JP
🇯🇵 Japan · Technology by The Ocean Cleanup
Ocean Plastic Detection
Japan's coastlines face some of the world's highest microplastic levels. Locating where plastic accumulates was largely guesswork.
Sensemaking
AI Role 2 of 4
Future Intelligence
AI models potential outcomes and forecasts future scenarios so cities can act before problems occur.
SL
🇸🇮 Ljubljana · Slovenia
Motorway Traffic AI (DARS)
Congestion and accidents on Slovenia's motorways were managed reactively, with no system to anticipate where or when problems would occur.
Future
EC
🇪🇨 Manabí · Ecuador
Productive and Climate Change Observatory
The region's watersheds are highly vulnerable to floods and droughts, but forecasting precipitation across complex terrain was beyond traditional methods.
Future
IN
🇮🇳🇧🇩 India & Bangladesh · Google
Google Flood Forecasting
Flood forecasts were too short-range and imprecise to give communities and emergency responders meaningful time to prepare.
Future
AI Role 3 of 4
Operational Augmentation
AI improves how city services and infrastructure are managed day to day — faster, cheaper, and more consistently.
ME
🇲🇪 Podgorica · Montenegro
Superslužbenik: AI Virtual Assistant for Municipal Services
Citizens had to already know the right office, the right documents, and the right process before they could get anything done in city administration.
Operational
AM
🇦🇲 Yerevan · Armenia
Air Quality Predictive AI & GIS Integration
Planners in a rapidly expanding city of 1.1 million lacked accurate land-use data to navigate spatial constraints like slopes and protected green zones.
Operational
BA
🇦🇷 Buenos Aires · Argentina
Prometea
Lawyers spent most of their time manually drafting routine rulings, creating a bottleneck that left complex cases under-resourced.
Operational
AI Role 4 of 4
Ecosystem Insights & Engagement
AI analyses signals from residents and communities to better understand who needs what — and who is being left out.
BA
🇦🇷 Buenos Aires · Argentina
BOTI WhatsApp Chatbot
Residents could not easily access fragmented city services like parking, health appointments, or local events through a single channel.
Ecosystem
DXB
🇦🇪 Dubai · UAE
Re-Leaf: Measuring the Cooling Impact of Urban Trees
Cities lacked data on which tree species genuinely cool urban areas, making evidence-based green infrastructure planning impossible.
Ecosystem
CO
🇨🇴 Barranquilla & Manizales · Colombia
MAIIA: Automated Mapping of Informal Settlements
Rapid urbanisation led to informal settlements that lacked utilities, faced climate risks, and went unrecorded in official surveys.
Ecosystem
UK
🇬🇧 Bradford · United Kingdom
Annie: AI for Adult Social Care
Bradford's adult social care service handled over 4,500 signposting calls a month — but was only reachable during office hours, in English, in a city with over 150 languages spoken.
Ecosystem
